title: T-053 — packages/db layout consolidation (single schema dir, relative symlink)
prompt:
# T-053 — packages/db layout consolidation

PRD: `docs/prd/00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md` — sections: §5 (Postgres+RLS), §8 (multi-tenant), §10 (R13 placeholder tables)
Project root: `/Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira`
Audit source: `_meta/audits/2026-05-07-foundation-wave-a-consistency-audit.md` §B; carry-forward CF-2/CF-3/CF-6/CF-7
Severity: P0 (Wave-B blocker)

## Goal
Consolidate the dual Drizzle schema directories (`packages/db/schema/` and `packages/db/src/schema/`) into one canonical location so drizzle-kit diff/push sees every business table (tenants, organizations, users, tenantMigrations, lot, workOrder, qualityEvent, shipment, bomItem). Replace the absolute-path symlink at `packages/db/src/migrations` with either a relative symlink or an updated `packageRoot` resolution. All existing tests must continue to pass.

## Implementation contract
Choose one of two convergence paths and implement it consistently:
- (preferred) Move `packages/db/src/schema/*.ts` files into `packages/db/schema/` and delete `packages/db/src/schema/` entirely. Update `packages/db/schema/index.ts` to re-export the moved tables alongside `baseline.ts`. Keep `drizzle.config.ts` schema path at `./schema`.
- (alternative) Update `drizzle.config.ts` to accept an array `schema: ['./schema', './src/schema']` (drizzle-kit ≥0.20) AND make `packages/db/lib/client.ts` import from a barrel that aggregates both directories.

Replace the absolute-path symlink `packages/db/src/migrations -> /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira/packages/db/migrations` with a relative symlink (`../migrations`) OR remove the symlink entirely by adjusting test `packageRoot` resolution to `path.resolve(__dirname, '../../migrations')`.

Delete the dead `r13Columns` helper in `packages/db/src/schema/r13-business-tables.ts` if unreferenced. Add `.references(() => organizations.id)` annotations to every `orgId` column in the consolidated Drizzle schema (so drizzle-kit emits the FK in generated SQL diffs even though DB-level FKs already exist via the migration files).

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/index.ts [modify — re-export tenantMigrations, lot, workOrder, qualityEvent, shipment, bomItem]
- packages/db/schema/tenant-migrations.ts [create — moved from src/schema]
- packages/db/schema/r13-business-tables.ts [create — moved from src/schema]
- packages/db/schema/baseline.ts [modify — add .references() to org_id columns where applicable]
- packages/db/src/schema/ [delete directory after move]
- packages/db/src/migrations [delete absolute symlink, replace with relative or eliminate]
- packages/db/drizzle.config.ts [modify — verify schema path discovers all tables]
- packages/db/lib/client.ts [modify — ensure import * as schema captures all exports]
- packages/db/__tests__/r13-business-tables.test.ts [modify — update import paths]
- packages/db/src/__tests__/tenant-migrations.test.ts [modify — update import paths]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the consolidated layout, when drizzle-kit generate runs, then all 9 business tables are discovered without warnings.
2. Given the symlink fix, when the repo is cloned to a different path, then tests still resolve migrations correctly.
3. Given consolidated imports, when pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test runs, then all pre-existing tests pass with zero regressions; AND Given .references() annotations, when drizzle-kit generate --dry-run runs, then the generated SQL includes FK clauses for every org_id column.
4. Given the dead-code cleanup, when grep r13Columns runs, then no unreferenced declaration remains.
## Test strategy
- RED: add a unit test in `packages/db/__tests__/schema-discovery.test.ts` that imports the schema barrel and asserts `Object.keys(schema)` includes all 9 expected exports.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db drizzle-kit generate --dry-run` and capture stdout to confirm no "unknown table" warnings.
- Run full `pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test` after consolidation; capture pass/fail counts.
- Verify symlink target with `ls -la packages/db/src/migrations` (if kept) shows relative path, not absolute.

## Risk red lines
- Do NOT modify any `packages/db/migrations/*.sql` file content (T-054 owns renames).
- Do NOT change `packages/db/package.json:main` in this task (T-058 owns lib/client.ts deprecation).
- Do NOT delete `baseline.ts` — it is the only place tenants/organizations/users are defined.
- Do NOT introduce new tables; this is a pure refactor.
- Do NOT break the legacy `db` export from `lib/client.ts` — Wave B code still imports it.

## Closeout evidence
Provide: changed_files, test_commands_and_results, acceptance_criteria_status (per AC), deviations_from_prd, git_status. Use the test-driven-development skill (RED schema-discovery test before move) and requesting-code-review at GREEN.

AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F7 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost).

Do not introduce new business tables.
Do not modify schema-runtime, outbox, ui, server packages.

Given the symlink fix, when the repo is cloned to a different path, then tests still resolve migrations correctly.

Given consolidated imports, when pnpm --filter @monopilot/db test runs, then all pre-existing tests pass with zero regressions; AND Given .references() annotations, when drizzle-kit generate --dry-run runs, then the generated SQL includes FK clauses for every org_id column.
Given the dead-code cleanup, when grep r13Columns runs, then no unreferenced declaration remains.
